title: OpenPencil Open-Source Design Editor
permitted_uses: Alternative UX design tooling evaluation for MIT-licensed local/headless design workflows.
claims_supported: OpenPencil states it is MIT licensed.
OpenPencil advertises local usage, headless CLI, JSON output, and design/code collaboration workflows.
claims_not_supported: That OpenPencil is as mature as Penpot for enterprise design collaboration.
That OpenPencil exports production-ready Ant Design components without review.
